# Expected files after /tool-sync runs
#
# /tool-sync is an EXPLICIT-invocation, external-write skill — it mirrors
# idea-to-deploy artifacts to external planning/doc tools (GitHub, Linear,
# Notion, Google Drive, Obsidian).
#
# May produce (when live sync is unavailable / not approved):
#   .itd-integrations/<target>.json   — export payload (e.g. notion.json,
#                                       linear.json, github.json)
#   .itd-integrations/obsidian/       — generated vault-ready Markdown
#                                       (prefer /obsidian-export for this)
#   STATE.json (update)               — sync result when it affects status
#
# Live external writes happen ONLY on explicit user intent — and they are
# external, not local files.
#
# /tool-sync MUST NOT:
#   - modify live external systems without explicit user request
#   - overwrite external user edits blindly (reconcile, don't clobber)
#   - sync secrets / private customer data / credentials into planning tools
#   - treat an external tool as authoritative over LAUNCH_PLAN.md / BACKLOG.md
#     unless the user explicitly says so
#
# /tool-sync MAY:
#   - read source artifacts (STATE.json, LAUNCH_PLAN.md, BACKLOG.md, HANDOFF.md)
#   - do connector-native reads before writes
#   - export payloads under .itd-integrations/
#   - print the output shape (SYNC TARGET / SOURCE ARTIFACTS / MODE / CHANGES /
#     UNSYNCED ITEMS / NEXT ACTION)
#
# Validation deferred (status: pending) — same bucket as fixture-15-advisor
# (external connector + stdout). Manual verification via notes.md.
